title: Dashboard shows blank screen on API error
body: fetchMetrics does not check response.ok, so a 500 yields a parse error and an empty dashboard. Surface an error state.

title: Metric values are not formatted
body: MetricCard prints raw numbers. Use formatNumber from utils so large values are readable.

title: Range selector resets scroll position
body: Changing the range in Dashboard remounts cards and jumps scroll. Investigate re-render keys.

title: No loading skeleton
body: The dashboard shows plain 'Loading...' text. Replace with skeleton cards for better UX.

title: useMetrics refetches on every keystroke
body: When range is bound to a text input, useMetrics fires too often. Debounce the range dependency.

title: Percent formatting rounds incorrectly for tiny values
body: formatPercent shows 0.0% for values below 0.0005. Decide on rounding/precision rules.

title: Metrics endpoint range param not typed
body: fetchMetrics takes a string range; restrict to a union type ('7d' | '30d') to avoid invalid calls.
